'''bagogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiomorphism|enantiomorphism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiomorphism|enantiomorphism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bagogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bægegeth|bægegeth]] || [[word:bægegej|bægegej]] || [[word:bægegesh|bægegesh]] || [[word:bægege|bægege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bagogogoth|bagogogoth]] || [[word:bagogogoj|bagogogoj]] || [[word:bagogogosh|bagogogosh]] || [[word:bagogogo|bagogogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bagogoth|bagogoth]] || [[word:bagogoj|bagogoj]] || [[word:bagogosh|bagogosh]] || [[word:bagogo|bagogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bagofgoth|bagofgoth]] || [[word:bagofgoj|bagofgoj]] || [[word:bagofgosh|bagofgosh]] || [[word:bagofgof|bagofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bagogotho|bagogotho]] || [[word:bagogojo|bagogojo]] || [[word:bagogosho|bagogosho]] || [[word:bagogoko|bagogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bagogoth|bagogoth]] || [[word:bagogoj|bagogoj]] || [[word:bagogosh|bagogosh]] || [[word:bagogo|bagogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bagogothol|bagogothol]] || [[word:bagogojol|bagogojol]] || [[word:bagogoshol|bagogoshol]] || [[word:bagogokol|bagogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bagogothotho|bagogothotho]] || [[word:bagogojojo|bagogojojo]] || [[word:bagogoshosho|bagogoshosho]] || [[word:bagogoko|bagogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bagogothon|bagogothon]] || [[word:bagogojon|bagogojon]] || [[word:bagogoshon|bagogoshon]] || [[word:bagogokon|bagogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bagogothoro|bagogothoro]] || [[word:bagogojoro|bagogojoro]] || [[word:bagogoshoro|bagogoshoro]] || [[word:bagogokoro|bagogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
